description: Comprehensive professional improvements: brand redesign (ElectricistApp logo, blue #1e40af primary, yellow #f59e0b accent), discount field in invoice/budget lines, duplicate invoice, mark-as-paid in list, email send button, client detail page with type field, payment method field, DD/MM/YYYY dates, breadcrumbs, copy-to-clipboard in comms, catalog inline editing with category headers, enhanced empty states, print watermarks, and dashboard top clients stats.
steps: Update globals.css with new brand colors (#1e40af primary, #f59e0b accent), better typography, animations
Update Sidebar and MobileNav with ElectricistApp branding and blue/yellow accent
Update invoice list with DD/MM/YYYY dates, mark-as-paid button, duplicate button, prominent invoice numbers
Update invoice creation form with discount field per line, payment method selector
Update invoice detail with email send button, print watermarks, footer with electrician data
Add client detail page with all invoices/budgets/communications
Update clients page/API with type field (particular/empresa)
Update communications page with copy-to-clipboard and new templates
Update catalog page with category headers and inline price editing
Update dashboard with top 3 clients by billing and month comparison stats
Update budget creation with 15-day default validity
Add breadcrumb components to detail pages
Enhance empty states with icons across all pages
acceptance_criteria: Brand colors are #1e40af (primary blue) and #f59e0b (accent yellow)
Sidebar shows ElectricistApp with lightning bolt logo
Invoice lines support discount field (% or EUR)
Invoices can be duplicated from the list
Mark as paid button visible in invoice list
Send by email button on invoice detail (generates mailto:)
Client detail page shows all related data
DD/MM/YYYY date format throughout the app
Payment method field (Transferencia, Efectivo, Bizum) on invoices
Copy message to clipboard in communications
Catalog grouped by categories with inline price editing
Dashboard shows top 3 clients and month vs previous comparison
npx next build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx next build` in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm successful build
findings: Build passes cleanly with all 29 routes. All features implemented: brand redesign with #1e40af blue and #f59e0b amber accent, ElectricistApp logo in sidebar, discount field on invoice lines, duplicate invoice, mark-as-paid in list, send-by-email button, client detail page with type field, payment method field, DD/MM/YYYY dates, breadcrumbs, copy-to-clipboard in comms, catalog with category headers and inline price editing, dashboard top 3 clients and month comparison, budget default 15-day validity, print watermarks, enhanced empty states with animations.
